Observation: Body text uses small font size on some content sections
Impact: Users with low vision may struggle to read page content
Recommended Fix: Increase body text to at least 16px, use readable line-height, and avoid long text blocks

Observation: Some paragraphs have dense spacing and limited white space
Recommended Fix: Increase spacing between paragraphs and group related content under clear headings

Observation: Decorative and content images do not consistently provide meaningful alt text
Impact: Screen-reader users may miss image purpose/context
Recommended Fix: Add descriptive alt text for meaningful images and empty alt for decorative images

Observation: Primary button color is visible but hover/focus feedback is not clearly noticeable
Impact: Keyboard and low-vision users may not know which control is active
Recommended Fix: Add stronger hover and focus styles using outline and contrast

Observation: Some links rely only on color to indicate clickability
Impact: Color-blind users may not identify links easily
Recommended Fix: Underline text links or add another non-color visual indicator

Observation: Visible focus indicator is missing or weak on some buttons/links
Impact: Keyboard-only users may lose track of navigation position
Recommended Fix: Add consistent :focus-visible outline to all interactive elements

Impact: Keyboard users must tab through repeated navigation on every page
Recommended Fix: Add a skip link that becomes visible on focus

Observation: Light gray text on white background may not meet WCAG contrast expectations
Impact: Users with low vision may have difficulty reading text
Recommended Fix: Use darker text color and validate contrast against WCAG AA

Observation: Button text contrast should be verified across default, hover, and disabled states
Impact: Controls may become hard to read in certain states
Recommended Fix: Use WCAG AA contrast checks for all button states

Observation: Search input placeholder is helpful but label association should be confirmed
Impact: Screen readers may not announce field purpose correctly
Recommended Fix: Add visible label or aria-label connected to the search input

Observation: Heading levels should follow a logical sequence
Impact: Screen-reader users may find page structure confusing
Recommended Fix: Use one H1 per page and sequential H2/H3 structure

Observation: Validation/error messages should be announced clearly
Impact: Assistive technology users may miss errors
Recommended Fix: Use aria-live or role=alert for validation messages
